global.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 13 of US-Israel attacks?
global.summary: The conflict’s wider effects are growing through cyberattacks, Strait of Hormuz tensions, and rising oil prices, showing how quickly regional war can unsettle daily life far beyond the battlefield.
global.whyItMatters: Helps frame prayers and preaching around fear, instability, and the global cost of conflict.

global.title: Missile Attack Kills at Least 3 in West Bank
global.summary: A new Iranian strike reportedly killed Palestinians in the West Bank, marking a grim expansion in who is being directly harmed by the war.
global.whyItMatters: A pastor may want to note the human toll on ordinary families and pray beyond political camps.

global.title: Iran Launches Missile Attack on Tel Aviv in Retaliation for Latest Killings
global.summary: Retaliatory missile fire on Tel Aviv underscores how the conflict remains volatile even amid talk of diplomacy and ceasefire efforts.
global.whyItMatters: Useful for understanding how fragile peace can be and for leading informed intercession.

canadian.title: Christopher Liew: How the mortgage renewal wave is squeezing near-retirees in Canada - CTV News
canadian.summary: CTV highlights growing pressure on near-retirees as mortgage renewals collide with higher costs, while also noting Canada’s welcome of a new U.S.-Iran ceasefire deal.
canadian.whyItMatters: Financial strain among older adults may be rising in congregations, making this relevant for pastoral care and benevolence planning.

canadian.title: Protests in Geneva intensify ahead of Trump's arrival for the G7 - NBC News
canadian.summary: Ahead of the G7 in Geneva, protests are intensifying as global tensions and diplomacy continue to shape the international agenda that Canada will be part of.
canadian.whyItMatters: Canada’s leaders are operating in a tense global environment that can affect economic confidence, security, and public discourse at home.

persecutedChurch.title: Israeli settlers attack Christian village as West Bank violence escalates - Middle East Eye
persecutedChurch.summary: The Christian village of Taybeh in the West Bank was reportedly attacked again, with fires, gunfire, and threats against homes amid escalating settler violence.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: A direct reminder to pray for vulnerable Christian communities living under pressure and fear.

persecutedChurch.title: Christian leaders hold emergency summit in Jerusalem to confront global rise in antisemitism - Fox News
persecutedChurch.summary: Christian leaders gathered in Jerusalem for an emergency summit focused on confronting rising antisemitism and strengthening Christian understanding of Jewish concerns.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: Offers a timely prompt for teaching against antisemitism and for cultivating biblically grounded solidarity.

leadership.title: When compliance kills trust: The psychological safety blind spot - HR Executive
leadership.summary: This piece argues that more policies and reporting channels do not automatically build trust; people speak up when leaders show fairness, follow through visibly, and protect honest dissent.
leadership.whyItMatters: Helpful for church staff culture, elder teams, and volunteer leadership where silence can hide deeper problems.

goodNews.title: Weekly round-up: Five stories you may have missed - BBC
goodNews.summary: A charity motorcycle ride in Dorset raised more than £100,000 for men’s health causes, part of a global effort that drew riders together across 109 countries.
goodNews.whyItMatters: A hopeful example of community, generosity, and creative public witness around health and care.
